x-enumeration-literals.name: Distribution Vehicle Administration
x-enumeration-literals.description: Administer the vehicle fleet used to distribute funds around the branch/ATM locations

x-enumeration-literals.name: Distribution Planning
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maintain and adjust the distribution schedule to meet cash movement demands across the branch/ATM network

x-enumeration-literals.name: Inventory Distribution Oversight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Track the correct movement of cash and cash inventory maintenance throughout the branch/ATM network

x-enumeration-literals.name: Inventory Provisioning
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handle bulk movements of cash into and out of the banks central cash handling facility to support cash distribution activity
